en.text: or (shorter) (; or ; (1 Chronicles 6:62 (H0077)), the same as H7416; in Joshua 19:13: is mistaken for part of a name; article with the passive participle of H8388; the (one) marked off, i.e. which pertains). Rimmon, the name of a Syrian deity, also of five places in Palestine
